headline: Jim Cramer: TE Connectivity Is ‘Terrific,’ Buy This Industrial Stock
summary: Jim Cramer recommended buying GE Vernova Inc. as Bernstein analyst initiated coverage with an Outperform rating and $1,206 price target.
